content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS]
( 
	[PerformanceDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[TrafficSource] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Account] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Campaign] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[AdGroup] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[Ad] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[MediaType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PaidOrOrganic] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Currency] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Cost] [float]  NULL,
	[Clicks] [float]  NULL,
	[Impressions] [float]  NULL,
	[Conversions] [float]  NULL,
	[PerformanceYear] [int]  NULL,
	[PerformanceMonth] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PerformanceWeek] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PerformanceWeekNumber] [int]  NULL,
	[PerformanceDayOfWeek] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DataSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DataSourceName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DataSourceType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [PerformanceDate] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
